name: Cellar
description: You are in a dark, damp cellar that feels designed to collect mistakes. A narrow passage leads north, while a low crawlway disappears to the south, apparently for situations that have already gone badly. To the west, the base of a steep metal ramp rises out of reach, its surface slick and unapologetic. Above you, a trap door has slammed shut, sealing the space with the finality of a decision nobody plans to revisit.
